selections.name: Ghazaaly
selections.reason: Drops from AOC50k to CLM50k, boasting a strong 110 speed figure. Class relief and outside draw in a one-turn mile fits perfectly.

selections.name: Alternate Reality
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz takes the mount on this consistent gelding. Speed figures are competitive and tactical speed plays well here.

selections.name: House United
selections.reason: Gaffalione aboard; has back class and figures that can contend if the pace melts down.

selections.name: I Don't Get It
selections.reason: Presents a solid 112 speed rating from past performances. Can stalk and pounce from the inside.

danger_horse.name: Light The Way
danger_horse.reason: Flavien Prat rides; capable of outrunning his 10/1 morning line if he gets a clean trip.

selections.name: Blue Fire
selections.reason: Jose Ortiz rides this Asmussen trainee. Strong 108 speed figure and draws well outside for a clean stalking trip.

selections.name: Margoinabubblebath
selections.reason: Consistent runner with a 104 speed rating. Should get a great setup sitting just off the early speed.

selections.name: Taliesin
selections.reason: Prat takes the reins. Has a 107 speed figure and will benefit from the long Churchill stretch.

selections.name: Sassy Princess
selections.reason: Gaffalione on the rail. Needs to avoid getting trapped but has the class to hit the board.

danger_horse.name: Outrageously
danger_horse.reason: Capable of popping a big figure on her best day; do not ignore at 6/1.

selections.name: Cruising Again
selections.reason: Romans/Garcia connection. First-time starter with solid works indicating readiness.

selections.name: Ez Miss Sassy
selections.reason: Casse trainee with Irad Ortiz up. Pedigree suggests she will be precocious.

selections.name: Texas Dandelion
selections.reason: Joe Sharp and Jose Ortiz team up. Has race experience which is a huge plus in this field.

selections.name: Fast Amy
selections.reason: Brendan Walsh and Flavien Prat. Works are steady; expect a professional debut.

danger_horse.name: Haute In Herre
danger_horse.reason: Drawing the rail is tough for a debut, but the Beckman/Saez combo is dangerous.

exotic_strategy.strategy: Box 2-3-4-5 in Exactas and Trifectas. Keep stakes low in 2yo MSW.

selections.name: Red Square
selections.reason: Wesley Ward and Irad Ortiz in a turf sprint is a lethal combination. Expect high early speed.

selections.name: Thunder Appeal
selections.reason: Another Ward trainee, this one with Jose Ortiz. Will likely press the pace and pounce.

selections.name: Untethered (ire)
selections.reason: First start since reported as a gelding. Prat rides for DeVaux; equipment change could wake him up.

selections.name: Ice Wolf
selections.reason: Foley and Saez. Has the tactical speed to save ground and make a late run.

danger_horse.name: Ghost Protocol
danger_horse.reason: Outside draw but has shown flashes of ability. Can close if the Ward runners duel.

selections.name: Chunk Of Gold
selections.reason: Standout 109 speed figure. Draws perfectly inside to save ground on both turns.

selections.name: Gould's Gold
selections.reason: Matches the top pick with a 109 speed figure. McPeek trainee will be closing hard down the long stretch.

selections.name: Publisher
selections.reason: Boasts a 112 speed rating. Jose Ortiz will have him perfectly positioned mid-pack.

selections.name: Tuscan Sky
selections.reason: Prat rides. 108 speed figure makes him a major player despite the outside post.

danger_horse.name: Admiral Dennis
danger_horse.reason: Brad Cox and Irad Ortiz. Always dangerous connections, cannot be left off tickets.

selections.name: Mae Town
selections.reason: Massive 125 speed figure towers over this field. Geroux will look to dictate terms early.

selections.name: Buttercream Babe
selections.reason: 114 speed figure and Johnny V in the irons. Will get a great stalking trip.

selections.name: Cynane
selections.reason: Prat on the rail with a 114 speed figure. Ground-saving trip makes her a massive threat.

selections.name: Itzel
selections.reason: Alvarado rides. 108 speed figure puts her right in the mix for the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Satin Blue
danger_horse.reason: Joe Sharp and Jose Ortiz. Has tactical speed to overcome the outside draw.

selections.name: Lack Of Riesling
selections.reason: Irad Ortiz rides for D'Amato. 96 speed figure is strong for a 2yo; outside draw is ideal for this distance.

selections.name: Pierette
selections.reason: Jose Ortiz up for Casse. 102 speed figure makes her a prime contender.

selections.name: Epic Reign
selections.reason: Asmussen trainee with a 96 speed figure. Will be flashing early speed.

selections.name: Liberty Rings
selections.reason: 107 speed figure is eye-catching. If she can overcome the outside post, she will be flying late.

danger_horse.name: True Blessing
danger_horse.reason: Flavien Prat rides. 81 speed figure is lower, but improvement is expected second time out.

selections.name: Hey Tuff Guy
selections.reason: 9/5 ML favorite with a 105 speed figure. Gutierrez rides; looks like the clear class of the field.

selections.name: He Is No Lie
selections.reason: Jaramillo ships in. 105 speed figure matches the favorite; will be applying pressure all the way.

selections.name: Sargent Bilko
selections.reason: Jose Ortiz rides. 108 speed figure is the highest in the field, making him a massive overlay potential.

selections.name: Captain Luke
selections.reason: Asmussen trainee with a 102 speed figure. Will get a great stalking trip.

danger_horse.name: Tolstoy
danger_horse.reason: Prat rides. 97 speed figure; can pick up the pieces if the pace melts down.

selections.name: Deep Flame
selections.reason: Brad Cox and Irad Ortiz. 114 speed figure and draws perfectly outside to stalk the pace in this 7F sprint.

selections.name: Brant
selections.reason: Baffert shipper with Prat. 115 speed figure makes him the primary threat to the favorite.

selections.name: Crown The Buckeye
selections.reason: Jose Ortiz rides. 106 speed figure; will be closing hard down the long Churchill stretch.

selections.name: Igniter
selections.reason: Johnny V on the rail. 106 speed figure; will need to secure position early to hit the board.

danger_horse.name: Prize Pick
danger_horse.reason: Saez rides. 109 speed figure; capable of outrunning his odds if he gets a clean trip.

selections.name: Dragoon Guard
selections.reason: Brad Cox and Irad Ortiz. 115 speed figure is elite. Will sit a perfect trip from the middle of the gate.

selections.name: Tour Player
selections.reason: Gaffalione rides. 112 speed figure; the one-turn mile suits his closing style perfectly.

selections.name: Imagination
selections.reason: Baffert shipper with Prat. 114 speed figure; will be applying pressure to the early leaders.

selections.name: Owen Almighty
selections.reason: Johnny V rides. 108 speed figure; draws well inside to save ground.

danger_horse.name: Hall Of Fame
danger_horse.reason: Jose Ortiz rides for Asmussen. 114 speed figure proves he has the class to upset.

selections.name: Moona Lisa
selections.reason: Baffert shipper with Prat. 120 speed figure is massive for this level; the clear horse to beat.

selections.name: Audra
selections.reason: Brad Cox and Irad Ortiz. 108 speed figure makes her the logical alternative to the favorite.

selections.name: Poise
selections.reason: Asmussen trainee with Jose Ortiz. 100 speed figure; will get a good stalking trip.

selections.name: Zengraya
selections.reason: 101 speed figure. Can pick up the pieces for the exotics if the pace is hot.

danger_horse.name: Lady Diversity
danger_horse.reason: Gaffalione rides. 99 speed figure; capable of hitting the board at a price.
